They are having trouble imagining getting back into the flow, and the move feels like a test of who they are. The user is worried that their worth will be judged by how the new space turns out, and the thought of it all still feels like a test, with anxiety feeling overwhelming. They are struggling to separate their self-worth from the outcome of the move and design work, and are fearful of judgment from others, including friends, which is exacerbating their anxiety.
